body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — Non-standard enum member name in `KnownVersions`

The new value `VLatestPreview = "2026-01-01-preview"` does not follow the established date-based naming convention used throughout all other management SDK packages. For example, compare with:
- `arm-containerregistrytasks`: `V20250301Preview = "2025-03-01-preview"`
- `arm-programmableconnectivity`: `V20240115Preview = "2024-01-15-preview"`

The correct name for this version should be `V20260101Preview`.

**Fix:** Report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) so the emitter generates the date-based enum name consistently. The name `VLatestPreview` is misleading as it will not remain "latest" once newer versions are added.

1 tool issue found in this PR for `@azure/arm-containerregistry@12.1.0-beta.1` (API version `2026-01-01-preview`). CI checks are passing. Version consistency looks good (`12.1.0-beta.1` in `package.json`, context file, and `CHANGELOG.md`). The CHANGELOG correctly compares against the stable `12.0.0` release. No breaking changes to existing stable API surface. No naming duplication or type safety violations in the new public API.

The one finding is a non-standard enum member name `VLatestPreview` in `KnownVersions` — all other management SDKs generated by the same tooling use date-based names (e.g., `V20260101Preview`).

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37742,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/containerregistry/arm-containerregistry/review/arm-containerregistry-node.api.md","line":1073,"issueType":"tool","category":"naming","description":"KnownVersions enum member 'VLatestPreview' does not follow the date-based naming convention; should be 'V20260101Preview'"}]}
```

</details>
